Style.name: STEPEDITAliases
Style.aliases: Osc1 PW;Osc1 Wave;Osc1 Ring Mod;Osc1 Hard Sync;Osc1 To Filter;Osc1 Gate;Osc1 Stall;Osc2 PW;Osc2 Wave;Osc2 Ring Mod;Osc2 Hard Sync;Osc2 To Filter;Osc2 Gate;Osc2 Stall;Osc3 PW;Osc3 Wave;Osc3 Ring Mod;Osc3 Hard Sync;Osc3 To Filter;Osc3 Gate;Osc3 Stall;Osc3 OFF;L01 Detune;L01 Amp (steps);L01 Transpose;L02 Detune;L02 Amp (steps);L02 Transpose;L03 Detune;L03 Amp (steps);L03 Transpose;L04 Detune;L04 Transpose;Voice Detune;Voice Amplitude;Voice Transpose;SID0 Osc3 OFF;Filter Cutoff;Filter Res;Filter LP;Filter BP;Filter HP;Core Volume

Style.name: EGEDITAliases
Style.aliases: Osc1 PW;Osc2 PW;Osc3 PW;Filter Cutoff;Filter Res;L01 Detune;L01 Amp;L01 Transpose;L02 Detune;L02 Amp;L02 Transpose;L03 Detune;L03 Amp;L03 Transpose;L04 Detune;L04 Transpose;Voice Detune;Voice Amplitude;Voice Transpose;Core Volume

StaticText.text: This tab is not required for normal synthesizer operation.
It's an experimental BONUS tool to study SID/C64 music.
And is thus not covered by any guarantees!!!
